summary: Tested Belgian lawyers feature: Backend API returns 17 lawyers (6 US + 11 Belgian), country-based filtering works, Belgian lawyers have correct fields. Frontend shows Belgian-adapted Lawyers page with 'Appels avocat' header, Belgian filters, EUR pricing, and 11 Belgian lawyers. Settings and Upload pages show Belgian indicators correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/lawyers returns all 17 lawyers (6 US + 11 Belgian)
Backend: GET /api/lawyers?country=BE returns 11 Belgian lawyers
Backend: GET /api/lawyers?country=US returns 6 US lawyers
Backend: Belgian lawyers have correct fields (country=BE, language in fr/nl/de, Belgian bar associations)
Backend: 5 francophone lawyers with French specialties (Droit du travail, Droit du bail, etc.)
Backend: 4 Dutch-speaking lawyers with Dutch specialties (Arbeidsrecht, Huurrecht, etc.)
Backend: 2 German-speaking lawyers with German specialties (Arbeitsrecht, Mietrecht)
Backend: Belgian lawyers have Belgian bar associations (Barreau, Balie, Kammer)
Backend: US lawyers have US state bar associations
Backend: All lawyers have required fields (lawyer_id, name, specialty, bar_state, etc.)
Backend: Belgian test user profile has country=BE, region=Wallonie, language=fr-BE
Frontend: Lawyers page shows 'Appels avocat' header for Belgian user
Frontend: Lawyers page shows Belgian filters (Tous, Disponible maintenant, Droit du travail, Droit du bail, Consommation, Contrats, Famille)
Frontend: Lawyers page shows '149 EUR' pricing on book buttons
Frontend: Lawyers page shows 11 Belgian lawyer cards
Frontend: Belgian lawyers displayed (Me Sophie Lecomte, Me Thomas Dupont, Me Julie Renard, Mr. Pieter Van den Berg, Herr Klaus Mueller)
Frontend: Upload page shows Belgian mode indicator (🇧🇪 Jasper Belgique · Wallonie · Droit belge applicable)
Frontend: Settings page Country selector shows 'Belgium / Belgique' selected
Frontend: Settings page Region selector shows 'Wallonie' selected
Frontend: Settings page Language selector shows 'Francais' selected
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_belgian_lawyers.py (New test file for Belgian lawyers feature)
seed_data_creation: 17 lawyers seeded at startup (6 US + 11 Belgian: 5 FR, 4 NL, 2 DE)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Belgian lawyers feature fully implemented and tested. 17 lawyers total: 6 US + 11 Belgian (5 francophone, 4 Dutch-speaking, 2 German-speaking). GET /api/lawyers?country=BE returns Belgian lawyers only. Frontend Lawyers page adapts based on user's country: Belgian users see 'Appels avocat' header, Belgian filters (Droit du travail, Droit du bail, etc.), and EUR pricing. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_belgian_lawyers.py can be reused for regression testing.
